title: Viprasol Trendline Volume Breakout
author: viprasol
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Viprasol Trendline Volume Breakout by viprasol.
## Overview The Trendline Volume Breakout (TVB) indicator automatically detects trendlines from pivot points, extends them in real time, and confirms breakouts with volume surge validation.
It handles both bearish (descending) and bullish (ascending) trendlines, scoring every breakout on a 0-10 scale based on trendline age, volume quality, slope steepness, and candle displacement.
